title: gmelina uniflora
intro: Gmelina uniflora, also known as the one-flowered gmelina or gmelina, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Southeast Asia. It is a deciduous tree with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Gmelina uniflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine in the form of decoctions and poultices.
